headlines.title: Trump says U.S. will begin guiding ships through Strait of Hormuz
headlines.description: President Donald Trump said Sunday that the U.S. will guide ships through the Strait of Hormuz, as he has offered little optimism that he will accept a recent proposal from Tehran to end the war

headlines.title: Acting AG Todd Blanche says Comey indictment looks beyond ‘a single Instagram post’
headlines.description: Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche tells Meet the Press the indictment of former FBI Director James Comey goes beyond an Instagram post showing seashells arranged to say “86 47,” terminology the Justice Department says threatens the president’s life.

headlines.title: Here's the biggest news you missed this weekend
headlines.description: President Donald Trump said the U.S. will guide ships through the Strait of Hormuz, as he has offered little optimism that he will accept a recent proposal from Tehran to end the war

headlines.title: Spirit Airlines announces all flights are canceled as it shuts down operations
headlines.description: Spirit Airlines announced in a statement that it would wind down operations immediately, canceling all flights, over rising jet fuel costs and struggling with profitability. NBC News’ Jay Blackman reports on how the decision will impact thousands of employees and travelers.

headlines.title: 12 places Trump's name or image is being added by the federal government
headlines.description: The Trump administration has made an aggressive push to add the president's name to buildings, battleships, money and government websites.

headlines.title: Kimi Antonelli wins Formula 1 Miami Grand Prix, extending his lead in the standings
headlines.description: Kimi Antonelli won the Formula 1 Miami Grand Prix on Sunday, securing his third victory in a row and increasing his lead in the world championship.

headlines.title: Photo essay: Southeast Asia's overfishing crisis — and the effort to uncover its roots
headlines.description: A photo exhibition offering a rare look into industrial fishing in Southeast Asia — and its impact on fragile marine ecosystems — was on display at a New York gallery last month.

headlines.title: Abortion pill maker asks to restore mail access
headlines.description: Abortion pill maker asks to restore mail access

headlines.title: Senator says Trump's actions violates war powers law
headlines.description: Democratic Sen. Adam Schiff of California says that while multiple presidents have not gone to Congress for war authorization in the past, President Trump’s actions are a “clear violation” of the War Powers Act of 1973.

headlines.title: DOJ chief says U.S. not actively at war with Iran
headlines.description: Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche reacts to President Trump saying he doesn't use the word "war" when referring to the U.S. conflict with Iran.

headlines.title: Driver crashes through Portland club
headlines.description: Surveillance video shows a driver crashing through the front doors of the Portland Athletic Club before the vehicle erupted into flames.

headlines.title: Thousands make little boy's birthday unforgettable
headlines.description: A mom’s viral plea brought thousands together to a city in Idaho to make one little boy’s birthday unforgettable.
